steps.title: Set up the conversion
steps.content: We are told that $1\text{ meter}=100\text{ centimeters}$, so multiply the number of meters by $100$ to get centimeters.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $0.064$ — this is $64$ divided by $1000$, not multiplied by $100$. Eliminated.
  • B) $0.64$ — this divides by $100$ instead of multiplying. Eliminated.
  • C) $6{,}400$ — this equals $64\times 100$. Matches.
  • D) $64{,}000$ — this multiplies by $1000$, which would be the conversion to millimeters. Eliminated.
C is correct.
